'''Tarl''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] in the [[Imperial Remnant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], serving under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Stalgis]] aboard the frigate [[Widowmaker (frigate)|''Widowmaker'']]. On a mission to [[Munlali Mafir]], he was infected with a [[Jostran]] which was removed by [[Tekli]], a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who was part of the mission. Tarl was a close friend of Lieutenant Stalgis.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
